title: Listening - Part 3
description: For each question, write the correct answer in the gap. Write one or two words or a number or a date or a time.
instructions: You will hear one person giving information. For questions 14–19, write the correct answer in the gap.
context: You will hear a teacher talking about a summer music club.
audio_script: Speaker: Welcome to our summer music club meeting. The club is open to anyone aged between eleven and sixteen, and you do not have to read music to join. This year, the club leader will be Emma [14]Reed[/14]. Emma plays guitar in a local band, and she is very patient with students who are new to performing. The club meets every Thursday, and the first session starts at [15]four fifteen[/15] in the afternoon. Please come straight after school, as the doors will open at four. If you have your own instrument, bring it, but the club can lend you a [16]keyboard[/16] if you need one. We also have a few guitars, but they must stay in school. In the first week, everyone will learn a simple [17]summer song[/17], and later you can choose music in small groups. Parents will be invited to a short concert in August. Practice sessions take place in the [18]dance studio[/18], because it is larger than the music room and has better speakers. Please do not bring food into the studio, but you can eat before the session in the playground. The club costs [19]six[/19] pounds for the whole summer, mainly to pay for photocopying and equipment. Please return your form to the school office by Friday if you want a place. If you feel nervous about singing or playing alone, do not worry. Most of the work will be done in groups, and nobody has to perform by themselves unless they want to. At the end of July, Emma will help you decide which pieces to play in the concert.

questions.explanation: The speaker says the club leader will be Emma Reed.
The speaker says the first session starts at four fifteen.
The speaker says the club can lend students a keyboard.
The speaker says everyone will learn a simple summer song.
The speaker says practice sessions take place in the dance studio.
The speaker says the club costs six pounds for the whole summer.
